zh.lifeSummary: 當Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog於大約1155年出生在哈薩克Qyzylorda阿拉爾阿萬時，他的父親Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys21歲，母親Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor27歲。他和Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1241年4月在威爾士格拉莫爾根享年87歲，埋葬在挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog于大约1155年出生在哈萨克斯坦Qyzylorda阿拉爾阿萬时，他的父亲Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys21岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor27岁。他和Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1241年4月在威尔士格拉莫爾根享年87岁，埋葬在挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

nameMeanings.name: Gam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Caradog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Respelling of Caradog, an ancient Celtic name apparently derived from the root cār ‘love’. This name was borne by a British chieftain of the 1st century ad in the Latinized form Caractacus, son of Cunobelinos.

en.lifeSummary: When Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog was born about 1155, in Avan, Aral, Kyzylorda, Kazakhstan, his father, Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys, was 21 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor, was 27. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan. He died in April 1241, in Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 87, and was buried in Møre og Romsdal, Norway.

fr.Baglan, Glamorgan, Wales: Baglan, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog est né environ 1155, à Avan, Aral Aūdany, Kyzylorda, Kazakhstan, son père, Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan. Il est décédé en avril 1241, à Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Møre og Romsdal, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog um 1155 in Avan, Aral Aūdany, Kyzylorda, Kasachstan geboren wurde, war sein Vater Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys 21 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor 27. Er hatte mit Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im April 1241 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Møre og Romsdal, Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog è nato il circa 1155 nel Avan, Aral Aūdany, Kyzylorda, Kazakistan, il suo padre, Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan. Morì nel aprile 1241, nel Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Møre og Romsdal, Norvegia.

ja.lifeSummary: Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradogが約1155年にカザフスタンQyzylordaアラルエイヴァンで生まれた時，父Morgan ap Caradoc of Powysは21歳，母Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Iforは27歳であった。彼はMatilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorganとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1241年4月にウェールズグラモーガンで87歳で死去し，ノルウェームoア オグ ロムスダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog(이)가 대략 1155년 카자흐스탄 Qyzylorda 아럴 아반에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 4월 웨일스 글램르건에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이 o르 오그 롬즈다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Avan, Aral Aūdany, Kyzylorda, Cazaquistão, seu pai, Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan. Ele faleceu em abril de 1241, em Glamorgan, Gales, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Møre og Romsdal, Noruega.

ro.Baglan, Glamorgan, Wales: Baglan, Glamorgan, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog родился около 1155 г. в местности аван, Арал, Кызылординская Область, Казахстан, его отцу по имени Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan. Он умер апрель 1241 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности мoр ог ромсдаль, Норвегия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog nació aproximadamente 1155, en Avan, Aral Aūdany, Kyzylorda, Kazajistán, su papá, Morgan ap Caradoc of Powys, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Ifor Bach of Plâs Ifor, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Matilda ferch Cunedda of Glamorgan. Murió en abril de 1241, en Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Møre og Romsdal, Noruega.
